SEARCH
Package org.apache.arrow.datafusion.providers.mysql

Class MysqlConnectionPool

java.lang.Object
org.apache.arrow.datafusion.providers.mysql.MysqlConnectionPool
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
public final class MysqlConnectionPool extends Object implements AutoCloseable
Handle to a MySQL connection pool, from which RustTableProvider and RustCatalogProvider instances can be opened.

Backed by datafusion_table_providers::sql::db_connection_pool::mysqlpool::MySQLConnectionPool. The upstream mysql-federation feature is enabled, so every table opened through this pool is federation-aware: combine with SessionContext.newWithFederation(org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.ConfigOptions) to get filter/projection/join pushdown into MySQL automatically. 

try (MysqlConnectionPool pool = MysqlConnectionPool.builder()
        .host("localhost")
        .port(3306)
        .database("app")
        .user("root")
        .password("secret")
        .sslMode("disabled")
        .build();
    RustTableProvider users = pool.openTable("users");
    SessionContext ctx = new SessionContext()) {
    ctx.registerTable("users", users);
    ctx.sql("SELECT count(*) FROM users").show();
}
See Also:
  • Rust datafusion-table-providers: MySQLConnectionPool

  • Method Details

    • builder

      public static MysqlConnectionPool.Builder builder()
      Returns a new MysqlConnectionPool.Builder.

    • openTable

      public RustTableProvider openTable(String tableReference)
      Opens the named table. tableReference is parsed by DataFusion — accepts schema.table, catalog.schema.table, or just table (defaults to the connected database). 
      try (RustTableProvider t = pool.openTable("customers")) {
    ctx.registerTable("customers", t);
    ctx.sql("SELECT * FROM customers").show();
}
      See Also:
      • Rust datafusion-table-providers: MySQLTableFactory::table_provider

    • openCatalog

      public RustCatalogProvider openCatalog()
      Opens the whole database as a RustCatalogProvider — one schema per MySQL schema, one table per MySQL table. Suitable for SessionContext.registerCatalog. 
      try (RustCatalogProvider catalog = pool.openCatalog()) {
    ctx.registerCatalog("mysql", catalog);
    ctx.sql("SELECT count(*) FROM mysql.app.customers").show();
}
      See Also:
      • Rust datafusion-table-providers: DatabaseCatalogProvider::try_new

    • close

      public void close()
      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
